claim_boundary: current-state discoverability only; this matrix does not expand runtime support or authorize production, package, performance, object-store, lakehouse, Foundry, REST, or Spark-replacement claims

production_unsupported_diagnostics.message: Broad production SQL/DataFrame execution is not admitted; scoped local-source/source-free smokes remain fixture evidence only.
production_unsupported_diagnostics.next_action: Use capabilities sql,dataframe and workflow-unsupported-plan to inspect supported local shapes before requesting execution.

production_unsupported_diagnostics.message: Production object-store reads/writes, credentials, range requests, network retries, and commit safety are not admitted by the v1 local scope.
production_unsupported_diagnostics.next_action: Use object-store capability reports and local fixture smokes; do not use cloud URIs as runtime support evidence.

production_unsupported_diagnostics.message: Lakehouse catalog transactions, table metadata evolution, object-store table commits, and production table recovery are not admitted.
production_unsupported_diagnostics.next_action: Use local table-commit rehearsal reports only as fixture evidence until table runtime gates close.

production_unsupported_diagnostics.message: Foundry proof-of-use, dataset source/sink execution, and platform-certified behavior are not available in the local v1 scope.
production_unsupported_diagnostics.next_action: Keep Foundry references as optional future integration evidence until approved platform proof exists.

production_unsupported_diagnostics.message: Production live, hybrid, remote, and distributed execution fabric claims are blocked outside scoped local fixtures and planning reports.
production_unsupported_diagnostics.next_action: Use engine capability and remote API plan reports for discovery; do not request production fabric execution.

production_unsupported_diagnostics.message: REST/event APIs are discovery and control-plane plans only; remote execution and data-plane delivery are blocked.
production_unsupported_diagnostics.next_action: Use REST/API contract plan outputs for schema review; do not treat plan previews as remote runtime support.

production_unsupported_diagnostics.message: Arbitrary extensions, plugins, Python callables, network APIs, model calls, and external effects are blocked unless a typed effect policy admits a specific fixture.
production_unsupported_diagnostics.next_action: Use extension inspection and effect admission matrices; production effectful execution requires separate policy and certificate evidence.

production_unsupported_diagnostics.message: Public package publication, release tags, signing, uploads, and channel install claims require maintainer approval and channel proof.
production_unsupported_diagnostics.next_action: Use package-channel readiness reports and local dry-run proof until explicit maintainer approval exists.

production_unsupported_diagnostics.message: Performance superiority, Spark displacement, and broad replacement claims are blocked unless workload-scoped correctness and benchmark evidence is current.
production_unsupported_diagnostics.next_action: Attach the selected timing surface, evidence tier, benchmark artifact, and correctness report before making a public performance claim.

production_unsupported_diagnostics.message: Finished-product and production-readiness claims remain blocked until runtime scope, package channels, security, docs, benchmark, schema, and approval gates pass.
production_unsupported_diagnostics.next_action: Use finished-product readiness and hard release-readiness reports; do not claim production support from local fixtures alone.

rows.claim_boundary: side-effect-free discovery only; does not execute datasets or authorize support claims
scoped local-source SQL runtime ladder smoke execution only; not broad SQL/DataFrame, object-store/table SQL, external-engine, fallback, production, or performance support

local compatibility ingest to Vortex artifact plus scout ingress, layout/write advisor, copy-budget, scoped append-only differential overlay, and capillary cold-preparation evidence only when feature enabled; no standalone cold-lane side lanes, table/object-store/CDC transaction, memory-efficiency, or performance claim
source-free/generated local output smokes only; not a broad SQL generator or platform sink
local SQLite table-scan import/export fixture only; no arbitrary SQL pushdown, network database, warehouse, credentials, extension loading, fallback, or performance claim
built-in deterministic nullable-int64 scalar fixture only; arbitrary Rust/WASM/Python/SQL/external-service UDFs remain blocked
built-in deterministic UTF-8 hash embedding/vector fixture only; real model calls, vector databases, ANN indexes, external APIs, credentials, network effects, plugins, and fallback remain blocked
bounded local reservation-denial fixture only; no real query-data spill, native spill IO, distributed runtime, larger-than-memory, production, or performance claim

scoped local-emulator object write plus sidecar recovery replay only; no live S3/GCS/ADLS, remote delivery, table/lakehouse production commit, exactly-once recovery, distributed, performance, or fallback claim

scoped local-manifest append commit rehearsal plus sidecar recovery replay only; no object-store/table catalog/lakehouse production commit, exactly-once recovery, distributed, performance, or fallback claim
local prepared-route evidence and benchmark rows only; no performance-superiority claim
scoped local adapter direct-transient benchmark smokes only; not Vortex-native, broad SQL/DataFrame, object-store/table, or performance evidence
thin CLI JSON protocol discovery only; not a native binding
scoped local query-builder lowering to admitted CLI smokes only
local generated-source helper execution only; no source connector expansion
local prepared Vortex batch workflow only; not a package or production API claim

thin Python CLI helpers for local SQLite fixture, extension metadata, built-in deterministic UDF fixture, and deterministic embedding/vector fixture only; no native binding, arbitrary UDF, plugin, network connector, real model/vector service, or fallback claim
flat local text SourceState, direct-transient, and vortex_ingest fixture coverage only; not object-store/table connector coverage
scoped local Vortex input primitives and prepared-route workflows only
local SQLite file table-scan import/export smoke only; Vortex ingest, arbitrary SQL, network databases, warehouses, credentials, production connectors, fallback, and performance claims remain blocked
local flat-scalar feature-gated SourceState, direct-transient, and vortex_ingest adapters only; object-store/table connector coverage remains separate
cloud object-store runtime and credentialed network reads are blocked

explicit public no-credential fixture read smoke only; parses provider URIs and reads caller-supplied local fixture bytes without credentials, network probes, cache writes, cloud writes, table commits, production, or performance claims
local fixture result output only; not production sink or transaction support
local Vortex artifact writes only when feature enabled; no object-store/table commit claim
local flat-scalar compatibility exports only when feature enabled
scoped local source-backed execution only
certified local cold-route fixture evidence only
prepared local Vortex reuse route only; not broad Vortex-native operator completeness
scoped local count/filter/project primitive coverage only
architecture/planning reports only; these commands do not execute workloads

scoped in-process local distributed fixture with local hash repartition/local combine/global merge only; no remote worker, object-store, remote shuffle, spill IO, production, performance, or Spark-displacement claim

scoped local filesystem checkpoint/changelog/state-store plus Vortex microsegment and cold-promotion manifest fixture only; no broker, object-store checkpoint, upstream Vortex file write, exactly-once, public production streaming, performance, or Spark-displacement claim
future execution fabric; no remote/distributed runtime claim
current-state discoverability only; not runtime expansion
no production-readiness claim is allowed
no faster-than or replacement claim is allowed
no public package publication or install-channel claim is allowed
integration/platform production support remains blocked or report-only
